titleStmt.title: SII 41.354: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 354. (A.R. No. 569 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple in Vijayamaṅgalam.

summary.p: Records that the king renovated and renamed a ruined tank called Vaṇakkuḷam as Vir-Pāṇḍyappērēri and granted all lands irrigated by it free of taxes and asked the ūrār to make provision for offerings to the goddess.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikoṉerimai koṇṭāṉ śrīvirapāṇṭiya
tevaṉeṉ yemakkuc cellā niṉṟa yāṇṭu Añcāvatu cakaraiyāṇṭu Ā
yiratti [ ]ṟṟiraṇṭu mutal kuṟuppu nāṭṭu vicaiyaṉmaṅkalattu
karum Ūrārkaḷukku taṅkaḷūril vākaipputtūril vaṭakkuvāciyil paṇakkuḷam neṭuṉāḷ pā
ḻpaṭṭuk kiṭakkiṟatākak keṭṭomikkuḷam taṅkaḷūr nāyaṉār tirunākiśvaramuṭaiyār tiru
kkāmak koṭṭattāḷuṭaiyaṉācciyāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa veñ
caṉattukkum palapaṭi nimaṉtattukkum yikkuḷam virapāṇṭiyap pereri Eṉ
ṟu veṭṭi yikkuḷamum yikkuḷakkiḻ nilamum nirreṟiṉa Aṭamellām yiṟaiyili teva
tāṉamāka viṟṟu kki muṉṟattu rutti Oṉṟu vāriya potuvār
ḷḷa Aḻivucorvu tāṅkaḷe ceyvarkaḷāka Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatāka kallilu
m cempilum veṭṭiyaṉupavikka kaṭavatāka nam Olai kuṭuttom Ippaṭi ṉamnaṉtama*rāṉā
r pāṟppeṭuttukkuṭukka Itu panmāheśvara rakṣaiivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ittaṉmam yiṟaṅkal paṇṇu
vāṉ vaḻi vaḻi vāṉ §
Digital edition of SII 41.354 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
